console.log('TikTok Pixel: Tracking Purchase (CompletePayment)'); if (!initialOrderData || !initialOrderData.order_items) { console.log('TikTok Pixel: No order data available for Purchase'); return; } const orderItems = []; let orderTotal = 0; // Parse order items const items = initialOrderData.order_items.items || initialOrderData.order_items; for (const key in items) { const item = items[key]; if (item) { orderItems.push({ id: String(item.id || item.competition_id), title: item.title, price: parseFloat(item.price || 0), quantity: parseInt(item.quantity || 1) }); orderTotal += parseFloat(item.total || (item.price * item.quantity) || 0); } } if (orderItems.length > 0) { tiktokEcommerce.trackPurchase(orderId, orderTotal, orderItems); orderTracked = true; console.log('TikTok Pixel: Purchase (CompletePayment) tracked'); // Store in localStorage to prevent tracking on page refresh try { localStorage.setItem('tiktok_order_tracked_' + orderId, 'true'); } catch (e) { console.log('TikTok Pixel: Could not store tracking status in localStorage:', e); } } } // Check if we've already tracked this order let alreadyTracked = false; try { alreadyTracked = localStorage.getItem('tiktok_order_tracked_' + orderId) === 'true'; } catch (e) { console.log('TikTok Pixel: Could not check localStorage:', e); } if (alreadyTracked) { console.log('TikTok Pixel: Order was already tracked in a previous page load, skipping'); orderTracked = true; placeOrderTracked = true; } else { // Track PlaceAnOrder immediately (order was just placed) if (initialOrderData) { trackPlaceAnOrder(); // If payment is already completed on page load, track Purchase immediately if (initialOrderData.payment_status === 'completed') { trackPurchase(); } else { // Otherwise, listen for payment completion // Monitor for payment status changes by checking the order overlay steps const observer = new MutationObserver(function(mutations) { mutations.forEach(function(mutation) { // Check if payment complete step is shown const paymentCompleteStep = document.getElementById('payment-complete'); if (paymentCompleteStep && window.getComputedStyle(paymentCompleteStep).display !== 'none') { console.log('TikTok Pixel: Payment completed detected'); trackPurchase(); observer.disconnect(); // Stop observing once payment is tracked } }); }); // Start observing the order overlay for changes const orderOverlay = document.getElementById('order-overlay'); if (orderOverlay) { observer.observe(orderOverlay, { childList: true, subtree: true, attributes: true, attributeFilter: ['style'] }); } // Also listen for klaviyo tracking call as a backup const originalKlaviyoTrack = window.klaviyoTrackPlacedOrder; if (typeof originalKlaviyoTrack === 'function') { window.klaviyoTrackPlacedOrder = function() { console.log('TikTok Pixel: Payment completion detected via Klaviyo'); trackPurchase(); return originalKlaviyoTrack.apply(this, arguments); }; } } } } } } // Track registration completion // Listen for registration form submission on login page if (window.location.pathname.includes('/account/login')) { const registerForm = document.getElementById('register-form'); if (registerForm) { registerForm.addEventListener('submit', function(e) { // Track registration when form is submitted successfully // Note: This fires on submission, actual success is handled by the server console.log('TikTok Pixel: Registration form submitted'); // We'll track after a small delay to ensure form validation passes setTimeout(function() { // Check if form is still visible (if hidden, likely successful) if (registerForm.checkValidity()) { tiktokEcommerce.trackCompleteRegistration(); } }, 100); }); } // Also track if registration success alert is shown const registrationAlert = document.getElementById('registration-alert'); if (registrationAlert) { const observer = new MutationObserver(function(mutations) { mutations.forEach(function(mutation) { if (registrationAlert.style.display !== 'none' && registrationAlert.textContent.trim() !== '') { console.log('TikTok Pixel: Registration success detected'); tiktokEcommerce.trackCompleteRegistration(); observer.disconnect(); } }); }); observer.observe(registrationAlert, { attributes: true, attributeFilter: ['style'], childList: true }); } }

} if (alreadyTracked) { console.log('TikTok Pixel: Order was already tracked in a previous page load, skipping'); orderTracked = true; placeOrderTracked = true; } else { // Track PlaceAnOrder immediately (order was just placed) if (initialOrderData) { trackPlaceAnOrder(); // If payment is already completed on page load, track Purchase immediately if (initialOrderData.payment_status === 'completed') { trackPurchase(); } else { // Otherwise, listen for payment completion // Monitor for payment status changes by checking the order overlay steps const observer = new MutationObserver(function(mutations) { mutations.forEach(function(mutation) { // Check if payment complete step is shown const paymentCompleteStep = document.getElementById('payment-complete'); if (paymentCompleteStep && window.getComputedStyle(paymentCompleteStep).display !== 'none') { console.log('TikTok Pixel: Payment completed detected'); trackPurchase(); observer.disconnect(); // Stop observing once payment is tracked } }); }); // Start observing the order overlay for changes const orderOverlay = document.getElementById('order-overlay'); if (orderOverlay) { observer.observe(orderOverlay, { childList: true, subtree: true, attributes: true, attributeFilter: ['style'] }); } // Also listen for klaviyo tracking call as a backup const originalKlaviyoTrack = window.klaviyoTrackPlacedOrder; if (typeof originalKlaviyoTrack === 'function') { window.klaviyoTrackPlacedOrder = function() { console.log('TikTok Pixel: Payment completion detected via Klaviyo'); trackPurchase(); return originalKlaviyoTrack.apply(this, arguments); }; } } } } } } // Track registration completion // Listen for registration form submission on login page if (window.location.pathname.includes('/account/login')) { const registerForm = document.getElementById('register-form'); if (registerForm) { registerForm.addEventListener('submit', function(e) { // Track registration when form is submitted successfully // Note: This fires on submission, actual success is handled by the server console.log('TikTok Pixel: Registration form submitted'); // We'll track after a small delay to ensure form validation passes setTimeout(function() { // Check if form is still visible (if hidden, likely successful) if (registerForm.checkValidity()) { tiktokEcommerce.trackCompleteRegistration(); } }, 100); }); } // Also track if registration success alert is shown const registrationAlert = document.getElementById('registration-alert'); if (registrationAlert) { const observer = new MutationObserver(function(mutations) { mutations.forEach(function(mutation) { if (registrationAlert.style.display !== 'none' && registrationAlert.textContent.trim() !== '') { console.log('TikTok Pixel: Registration success detected'); tiktokEcommerce.trackCompleteRegistration(); observer.disconnect(); } }); }); observer.observe(registrationAlert, { attributes: true, attributeFilter: ['style'], childList: true }); } }

if (paymentCompleteStep && window.getComputedStyle(paymentCompleteStep).display !== 'none') { console.log('TikTok Pixel: Payment completed detected'); trackPurchase(); observer.disconnect(); // Stop observing once payment is tracked } }); }); // Start observing the order overlay for changes const orderOverlay = document.getElementById('order-overlay'); if (orderOverlay) { observer.observe(orderOverlay, { childList: true, subtree: true, attributes: true, attributeFilter: ['style'] }); } }, 100); }); } // Also track if registration success alert is shown const registrationAlert = document.getElementById('registration-alert'); if (registrationAlert) { const observer = new MutationObserver(function(mutations) { mutations.forEach(function(mutation) { if (registrationAlert.style.display !== 'none' && registrationAlert.textContent.trim() !== '') { console.log('TikTok Pixel: Registration success detected');
